name: Guise of the Smirking Devil
description:
This ice-blue half-mask is adorned with a wicked silver grin that covers the wearer's mouth, leaving the rest of the face uncovered. You gain a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks.

Activate—Hideous Wail 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The mask emits a soul-chilling scream that deals |options:area-damage] damage to each living creature in a ( save).

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of .
